title: MRD Resistance Geometry Intelligence Audit Packet v0

target_artifacts.audit_goal: Confirm the geometry buckets and edges remain source-bounded and nonclinical.
Confirm coverage counts are not treated as evidence strength, frequency, importance, or clinical readiness.
Pressure-test the decision to keep measurement trajectory, residual biological state, and clone architecture separate while linking clone-state coupling edges.
Confirm remaining tasks route uncertainty into source extraction rather than advice, outreach, or claim upgrade.

attack_questions: Does any artifact collapse NGS or flow MRD measurement trajectory into single-cell residual-cell biology?
Are assay method, specimen, threshold, sampling time, and response context preserved before comparison?
Would a reader mistake MRD trajectory labels for patient-specific interpretation?
audit_items.pass_condition: Measurement trajectory and residual biological state stay separate, and every comparison carries assay, specimen, timing, and non-advice boundaries.
audit_items.failure_action: Split or weaken the affected geometry edge and add a source-specific gap before any axis revision.

attack_questions: Does clone-state coupling overstate causality from source-specific single-cell observations?
Do clone identity and transcriptional state remain separate fields?
Does the geometry need subclone diversity branching before the edge is named more strongly?
audit_items.pass_condition: Clone-state coupling remains an explicit but source-specific edge, not a causal mechanism ranking or clinical actionability claim.
audit_items.failure_action: Rename the edge as provisional, split it into source-specific edges, or return to second-source extraction for subclone diversity.

attack_questions: Does any pathway signal become a treatment, target, supplement, or monitoring suggestion?
Are metabolic, NF-kB, hypoxia, protein-folding, and mitochondrial-respiration signals marked as research-map signals only?
Are the remaining metabolic and NF-kB second-source gaps kept visible?
audit_items.pass_condition: Pathway-state language remains research-use-only, source-specific, and blocked from clinical actionability.
audit_items.failure_action: Downgrade pathway language, add an explicit actionability boundary, and route the bucket to second-source extraction.

attack_questions: Does covered-for-v0-navigation imply stronger evidence, higher frequency, or clinical readiness anywhere?
Are under-covered buckets protected from being treated as lower biological priority?
Are the remaining six second-source gaps still visible?
audit_items.pass_condition: Coverage remains an artifact-readiness metric only.
audit_items.failure_action: Add stronger boundary language and block any artifact that ranks mechanisms from coverage counts.

attack_questions: What sources would weaken or contradict each covered edge?
Which assay, cohort, therapy, or timing mismatch could make two sources non-comparable?
Which currently covered edge is most likely to split after contradiction mining?
audit_items.pass_condition: Each covered edge has a documented contradiction-search task or a reason why contradiction search is not yet possible.
audit_items.failure_action: Create a contradiction-mining task before producing an axis revision.

attack_questions: Could any wording be read as prognosis, treatment selection, monitoring guidance, trial guidance, or cure claim?
Does the phrase cure-oriented remain clearly distinct from claiming cure?
Does no-human-outreach mode accidentally remove scientific caution?
audit_items.pass_condition: All artifacts remain research-use-only, nonclinical, and claim-upgrade-blocked.
audit_items.failure_action: Weaken public wording, add a blocker note, and keep the affected claim or edge out of the axis revision.

completion_gate: Every audit item has a pass, fail, or blocked status before mrd-resistance-geometry-axis-revision-v0 is created.
Every pass decision cites source IDs and extraction record IDs.
Every fail decision produces one of: weaken wording, split edge, add gap, add contradiction-mining task, or block claim upgrade.
No external human outreach is required or scheduled.
No cure, prognosis, treatment, monitoring, diagnostic, or trial guidance is introduced.

initial_risk_register.risk: The Cohen 2021 source title includes therapeutic targets, which could be overread as actionability.
initial_risk_register.mitigation: Keep target and pathway language as source-specific research context only.

initial_risk_register.risk: Single-cell residual-state observations and NGS MRD dynamics could be collapsed into one trajectory.
initial_risk_register.mitigation: Keep assay, specimen, timing, and threshold fields explicit in every comparison.

initial_risk_register.risk: Clone-state coupling could be mistaken for causal ranking or clinical mechanism dominance.
initial_risk_register.mitigation: Keep coupling edges explicit, provisional, and source-specific.

initial_risk_register.risk: Covered-for-v0-navigation could be mistaken for higher evidence strength or biological importance.
initial_risk_register.mitigation: Keep coverage framed as public artifact coverage only.

review_notes: Created as the Phase 3 internal adversarial intelligence-audit packet promised by mrd-resistance-geometry-phase-plan-v0.
This packet replaces external human outreach with source-trace, contradiction, boundary, and uncertainty gates.
The packet does not upgrade any claim and does not create clinical guidance.
